title: Pre-Award — Proposal Submission Checklist
content:
Guidance for researchers preparing proposals at Morgan State University. The Office of Research Administration recommends creating a timeline and/or table to help complete sections of the proposal, structuring proposals with outlines, and seeking external review. Completing a successful proposal can take several weeks to several months, so start early. Contact ORA at ask.ora@morgan.edu or 443-885-4044 (fax 443-885-8280).

Two downloadable checklists are linked from this page:
- Basic Proposal Preparation Checklist (PDF): https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/BasicChecklist-Proposals.pdf
- NSF EIR Proposal Preparation Checklist (PDF): https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/Checklist-EiRProposalPrep.pdf

Additional related ORA pages include Proposal Components, Budget Development, Fringe Benefit Rate, F&A Cost Rates, and Internal Routing Form, all part of the Pre-Award workflow.
